configurations.name: web-dev
runtimeArgs: lsof -ti tcp:3002 -sTCP:LISTEN | xargs -r kill; exec npm run dev -- --port 3002

configurations.name: admin-dev
runtimeArgs: lsof -ti tcp:3011 -sTCP:LISTEN | xargs -r kill; exec npm run dev -- --port 3011

configurations.name: api-5099
runtimeArgs: lsof -ti tcp:5099 -sTCP:LISTEN | xargs -r kill; ASPNETCORE_ENVIRONMENT=Development ASPNETCORE_URLS=http://127.0.0.1:5099 exec dotnet run --no-launch-profile

configurations.name: dev
runtimeArgs: for p in 3002 5099; do lsof -ti tcp:$p -sTCP:LISTEN | xargs -r kill; done; trap 'kill 0' EXIT INT TERM; (cd backend/Api && ASPNETCORE_ENVIRONMENT=Development ASPNETCORE_URLS=http://127.0.0.1:5099 dotnet run --no-launch-profile) & exec npm --prefix web run dev -- --port 3002
